Jeffrey Epstein.title: Jeffrey Epstein indicted on sex trafficking charges
Epstein found dead in jail cell
2008 Florida plea deal for solicitation of prostitution

Ghislaine Maxwell.title: Ghislaine Maxwell sentenced to 20 years for sex trafficking
Maxwell convicted on five of six counts

Jean-Luc Brunel.title: Jean-Luc Brunel found dead in Paris jail cell
Brunel charged with rape of minors and sex trafficking

Prince Andrew.title: Prince Andrew settles sexual abuse lawsuit with Virginia Giuffre
Andrew stripped of military titles and royal patronages

Donald Trump.title: No criminal charges filed related to Epstein; served as 45th and 47th President
2016 lawsuit alleging rape of 13-year-old dropped before election
FBI complaint reports on Trump-Epstein allegations in released DOJ files

Bill Clinton.title: No charges filed; Clinton denied close relationship with Epstein
Flight logs show Clinton flew on Epstein's plane 26 times

Alan Dershowitz.title: Dershowitz accused by Virginia Giuffre; denied allegations
Giuffre later recanted accusations against Dershowitz

Leon Black.title: Leon Black paid Epstein $158 million for advice; stepped down as Apollo CEO
No criminal charges; settled civil lawsuit

Les Wexner.title: Wexner severed ties with Epstein in 2007; said Epstein misappropriated funds

Kevin Spacey.title: Spacey acquitted of sexual assault charges in UK
Found not liable in civil sexual abuse case

Harvey Weinstein.title: Weinstein convicted of rape in New York
Sentenced to 23 years in New York, 16 years in Los Angeles

Bill Cosby.title: Cosby convicted of sexual assault; conviction later overturned

R. Kelly.title: R. Kelly convicted of racketeering and sex trafficking

Ehud Barak.title: No charges; Barak acknowledged visiting Epstein's residences

Woody Allen.title: No charges related to Epstein; separate sexual abuse allegations denied

Bill Richardson.title: Richardson denied Giuffre's allegations; died in 2023

Sarah Kellen.title: Named as co-conspirator but received immunity in 2008 plea deal

Lesley Groff.title: Named as co-conspirator; received immunity in 2008 plea deal

Virginia Giuffre.title: Primary accuser; settled civil suits against Maxwell, Prince Andrew
